# tabs

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Browser tab strip: an in-app row of tabs, each an independent navigation stack, with a new-tab button. Renders above the chrome bar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Browser.TabStrip` "Tab strip" → `TabStrip`
  - Uses: `apps/browser/shell.Browser`, `apps/browser/shell.Favicon`, `apps/browser/shell.useBrowserTabs`, `primitives/bar.Bar`, `primitives/css/row.Row`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/spinner.Spinner`, `primitives/css/truncating-text.TruncatingText`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.ControlSizeProvider`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
